privileged_info_summary: All data in this task is synthetic. The task operates on patient record pid=19 for synthetic patient Luann Sanford (DOB: March 26, 1977) in a test NOSH ChartingSystem instance at Hillside Family Medicine practice. Original demographics are: 71 Ash St, Greenfield, MA 01301; phones 413-555-1019 (home) and 413-555-2019 (cell); email luann.sanford.old@example.com. Target update values are: 127 Franklin St, Springfield, MA 01103; phone 617-555-9283; email luann.s.updated@healthmail.test. Login credentials are demo_provider / Provider1234!. All phone numbers, email domains, names, and addresses are test data from the Synthea synthetic patient generator, with no connection to real individuals.
